faq.question: Will trackur always be free?
faq.answer: The core product — tracking your job applications — will always be free. If we add features that cost us money to run (like file storage or email notifications), those may have a paid tier.

faq.question: How do you make money?
faq.answer: Right now, we don't. This is a side project built by someone who needed it. If you find it useful, you can buy us a coffee.

faq.question: Can I export my data?
faq.answer: Yes. You can export all your data as CSV at any time. No lock-in.
